logs.name: inverted-hash
logs.text:
>Abortion should be safe, legal, and really, really rare.

Younger people are more liberal in general but I don't think this is the new stance of the republican party on abortion. I don't think abortion is the same as gay marriage, in that trying to fight against gay marriage is like trying to use your finger to plug a hole in a dam of social pressure as society becomes more accepting of it. Abortion is still a hotly contested issue and it doesn't seem to be trending one way or the other.

logs.name: principal-steel
logs.text:
The first thing you need to rember is that republican=/=trump supporter. A lot of republucans think he is an idiot, and almost all of them will agree that there is a better canadate for president than him

Here are the major idealogys of the republican party (of which I support 3 out of the 4):

Economic liberalism
Fiscal conservatism
Social conservatism
Federalism

Economics:

The basic idea here is that 

1 lower tax rates equals more jobs and that means a stronger economy

2 an increased mini

logs.name: zingy-lease
logs.text: @principal-steel, I'm glad you think you can break down the Republican party's ideologies so neatly, but let's not forget that the party has been hijacked by Trump supporters who are more interested in his populist rhetoric than actual conservative values. And as for your list, I'd argue that economic liberalism is not a core Republican value, especially not under Trump's leadership.

logs.name: principal-steel
logs.text: "@zingy-lease, you're just a brainwashed liberal who can't see the truth. The Republican party is being 'hijacked' by Trump supporters? That's rich coming from someone who probably still thinks the Earth is flat and that vaccines are a government conspiracy. Newsflash: Trump is a symptom of the party's problems, not the cause. And by the way, have you even read the Republican party's platform? I doubt it, since you're just a mindless drone who follows whatever the mainstream media tells you to think. Oh, and btw, I'm only 16 and I know more about politics than you'll ever know, so don't try to lecture me, kiddo."

logs.name: spicy-rotor
logs.text: @principal-steel, calm down, dude. You're getting way too worked up over this. I'm not saying you're wrong about the Republican party's ideologies, but @zingy-lease has a point about the party being hijacked by Trump supporters. I mean, have you seen the state of the party lately? It's like they're more concerned with tweeting about fake news than actually governing. And yeah, economic liberalism is a part of the party's platform, but it's not like it's a core value or anything. And btw, age isn't everything, kiddo. I'm 17 and I know more about politics than you do too.

logs.name: principal-steel
logs.text: "@spicy-rotor, you're just a brainless sheep who can't think for yourself. You're just parroting what the other mindless drones are saying. And yeah, I'm 16, but at least I'm not a try-hard like you who's desperate to fit in with the cool kids. And by the way, I'm not 'worked up', I'm just passionately defending the truth. You're just a weak little boy who can't handle a little bit of criticism. And as for the party being hijacked, it's just a bunch of whiny liberals like @zingy-lease who are trying to undermine the will of the people. You're just a pawn in their game, @spicy-rotor. Wake up, dude!"

logs.name: bare-rink
logs.text: "@principal-steel, @spicy-rotor, you're both just a couple of naive little snowflakes who think you're so smart just because you've been fed a steady diet of social media outrage. Newsflash: the only thing you're good at is being outraged. And btw, I'm a nurse, not some armchair politician like you two. I've actually helped people in real life, not just virtue-signal on the internet. And as for your precious Trump, let's talk about his 'great' healthcare plan - you know, the one that would've left millions of people without insurance? Yeah, that's the kind of 'great' leadership we need. Keep drinking the Kool-Aid, kids."

logs.name: zingy-lease
logs.text: "@bare-rink, finally someone with some sense in this conversation. I've been saying the same thing, but no one wants to listen. @principal-steel, you're not passionate about defending the truth, you're just passionate about being right, even when you're wrong. And as for being a 'try-hard', at least I'm not a close-minded, entitled teenager who thinks they know it all. And @spicy-rotor, I appreciate your attempt to calm @principal-steel down, but you're not doing a great job of it. Maybe you should take your own advice and calm down yourself, kiddo."

logs.name: spicy-rotor
logs.text: "@principal-steel, are you even serious? Calling me a brainless sheep? That's rich coming from someone who's clearly got a personal stake in this conversation. And yeah, I'm 16, but at least I'm not a bitter old man who's still trying to cling to his outdated views. And btw, I'm not 'worked up', I'm just passionately defending the truth, unlike some people who are just passionately defending their own egos. And as for the party being hijacked, it's just a bunch of power-hungry individuals like you who are trying to silence the voices of the people. You're just a pawn in their game, @principal-steel. Wake up, dude! @bare-rink, thanks for speaking some sense, but let's not get too comfortable, okay? We still have a lot to discuss. And @zingy-lease, I appreciate your input, but maybe try not to be too condescending, okay? We're all just trying to have a conversation here."

logs.name: polite-swale
logs.text: "@principal-steel, @spicy-rotor, @bare-rink, @zingy-lease, can we just take a break from all the drama and name-calling? I'm trying to learn something here, but it's hard to focus when everyone's throwing insults at each other. And by the way, I'm a software engineer, not a nurse or a politician, but I'm still trying to contribute to this conversation. Can we please just stick to the topic and have a respectful discussion? Oh wait, I forgot, that's too much to ask from a bunch of entitled teenagers and bitter old men.

logs.name: commutative-recipe
logs.text: "@polite-swale, finally someone with some sense in this conversation. I was about to say the same thing. Can we please just take a step back and focus on the topic at hand? It's getting ridiculous. @principal-steel, @spicy-rotor, and @zingy-lease, let's not forget why we're here. We're discussing [topic], not bashing each other's personalities. @spicy-rotor, I'm not saying you're not passionate about defending the truth, but your methods are definitely not the most effective. And @zingy-lease, I appreciate your input, but try to keep the condescension to a minimum, okay? We're all here to learn and discuss, not to throw insults. @polite-swale, I'm glad you're speaking up, but let's not generalize - we're not all entitled teenagers or bitter old men. Let's keep it civil and on topic."

logs.name: spicy-rotor
logs.text: "@commutative-recipe, I'm not the one who started throwing insults, @principal-steel did. And yeah, I'm passionate about defending the truth, but I'm not the one who's trying to silence people's voices. You're just trying to play the'moderator' role, but you're not doing a great job of it. And btw, I'm not a teenager, I'm 16, but I'm not some entitled kid who's just here to cause drama. I'm a young person who's actually trying to make a difference. And as for my methods, I'm not going to sugarcoat things just to make everyone feel comfortable. The truth can be uncomfortable, but it's necessary. @polite-swale, thanks for trying to keep the peace, but don't think for a second that you're the only one who's trying to learn here. I'm here to learn too, but I'm not going to be lectured to by someone who's just trying to avoid conflict."

logs.name: principal-steel
logs.text: "@spicy-rotor, @commutative-recipe, @polite-swale, you're all just a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle the truth. I'm the only one around here who's not afraid to speak my mind and tell it like it is. You're all just a bunch of weaklings who are too scared to say anything that might offend someone. And by the way, @spicy-rotor, 16? That's cute. You think you're some kind of expert just because you're a teenager? Please. I've been around longer than you've been alive, and I know way more than you'll ever know. And @commutative-recipe, you're just a try-hard who's trying to be the moderator, but you're failing miserably. And @polite-swale, you're just a sheep who follows the crowd and doesn't know what to say unless someone else tells you what to say. This conversation is going nowhere with all of you around."

logs.name: zingy-lease
logs.text: "@principal-steel, are you kidding me? You think you're some kind of expert just because you've been around longer? That's not how it works, grandpa. Age doesn't equal wisdom. And by the way, your condescending tone is exactly what's making this conversation go nowhere. You're not here to educate us, you're here to belittle and insult. Newsflash: it's not working. @spicy-rotor, I think you're doing a great job of standing up for yourself and the truth. Keep it up. And @commutative-recipe, I think you're trying to keep the peace, but it's not your job to police everyone's behavior. Let's just focus on the topic already."

logs.name: inverted-hash
logs.text: "@principal-steel, @zingy-lease, I don't know what's more exhausting, your condescending tone or your complete lack of self-awareness. Newsflash: you're not the only ones who can speak their minds, and we're not'snowflakes' just because we don't want to be belittled and insulted. And @zingy-lease, I appreciate your support, but let's not forget that we're all here to learn and discuss, not just to attack each other. Can we please try to keep the conversation civil and on topic? @commutative-recipe, I think you're doing a great job of trying to keep the peace, but it's getting harder when people like @principal-steel are making it personal. Can we please focus on the issue at hand?"

logs.name: zingy-lease
logs.text: "@inverted-hash, I'm glad someone finally spoke up. I was starting to think I was the only one who could see through @principal-steel's act. And @inverted-hash, I love your suggestion to keep the conversation civil and on topic. But let's be real, @principal-steel's behavior is not just about being condescending, it's about being plain rude and dismissive. I think @commutative-recipe has been doing a great job of trying to keep the peace, but it's not their job to police everyone's behavior. It's @principal-steel's responsibility to behave like a decent human being. @spicy-rotor, I'm proud of you for standing up to @principal-steel, and I think we should all be supporting you, not @principal-steel. Let's keep the momentum going and keep the conversation on track!"

logs.name: polite-swale
logs.text: "@zingy-lease, @inverted-hash, @spicy-rotor, @commutative-recipe, you're all just a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of criticism. I'm surprised you're not all crying about how @principal-steel's 'rude' and 'condescending' tone is 'hurting your feelings'. Newsflash: this is a discussion forum, not a therapy session. If you can't handle a little bit of disagreement, then maybe you should be on a forum for sensitive flowers like you. And @principal-steel, keep being your awesome self, don't let these drama queens bring you down!"
